last_report: Difficult slate tonight — only 1 pick meets all quality thresholds. The OKC -24.5 spread against Utah is the standout edge: confirmed tank matchup with elite vs depleted rosters, NetRtg L15 gap of 90 raw points, and strong EV at 31.2%. Star rest risk for OKC is the primary concern, adjusted in confidence. Injury feed quality: NBA official PDF with 22-team coverage — full confidence rules apply. Pace data available but O/U markets not offered tonight. Key rejections: CLE -15.5 flagged as anomaly (dual franchise absence may not be priced); Charlotte vs MIN failed EV floor despite strong L15 edge (Edwards GTD drag); HOU/GSW interesting but HOU ML below 1.70 floor and Curry uncertainty undermines any GSW ML case.

rejected_games.reason: BOS ML 1.24 far outside target range; TOR ML 4.20 exceeds 2.50 ceiling; spread odds 1.90/1.92 within range but NetRtg L15 gap (BOS +34.2 vs TOR +25.2 = 9.0) favors BOS strongly yet spread confidence undercut by TOR's positive L15 and IQ confirmed OUT (verified NBA PDF) already priced in. No EV edge found at available odds.

BKN ML 1.64 below 1.70 floor. WAS ML 2.28 in range but Washington is confirmed full-tank (Trae Young, Davis, Russell, Sarr, Vukcevic all OUT) — franchise_player_rules prohibit betting WAS to win. BKN spread -3.0 at 1.88: BKN NetRtg L15 -38.8 vs WAS -35.2 — both terrible, gap negligible. No edge.

PHX ML 1.21 far outside range; CHI ML 4.50 exceeds 2.50 ceiling. PHX is confirmed cold fade candidate (L10 3-7, L2 skid) but ML odds far too short. CHI spread +10.0 at 1.94: CHI NetRtg L15 -53.7 vs PHX +14.2 — massive gap favors PHX. Anfernee Simons OUT, Giddey/Buzelis/Richards all Questionable for CHI. CHI confirmed tank (29-48, L10 2-8). No valid edge in range.

MIL ML 1.40 below 1.70 floor. MEM ML 3.00 exceeds 2.50 ceiling. MIL spread -6.0 at 1.88: Giannis OUT (confirmed NBA PDF) — franchise player absence; MIL NetRtg L15 -43.2 vs MEM -48.9 — both deeply negative, gap only 5.7. MIL without Giannis is not trustworthy favorite. MEM also depleted (Aldama, KCP, Clarke, Edey all OUT). No reliable edge.

ANOMALY CHECK: CLE at 1.08 ML with Allen AND Mobley both OUT (confirmed NBA PDF) — line not updated for dual franchise-player absence. CLE spread -15.5 is extreme. IND ML 8.00 way outside range. CLE NetRtg L15 -5.7 with both big men out is alarming vs IND L15 +4.0. IND: Haliburton OUT, Nembhard OUT, Nesmith OUT, McConnell OUT — severely depleted too. Both teams critically injured. CLE ML 1.08 is extreme undervaluation risk with Allen+Mobley out. Flagging as anomaly — line may not reflect dual absences.

Charlotte ML 1.79 in range but EV insufficient. Charlotte L15 +44.0 vs MIN L15 -4.0 strongly favors Charlotte but Anthony Edwards GTD (-10 conf) brings Charlotte base conf down to 56. EV = (0.56 × 1.79) - 1 = 0.0024 = 0.24% — below 5% EV minimum. MIN spread +2.0 at 1.90: MIN is home underdog with Edwards GTD — unpredictable. No qualifying edge found.

Both teams severely depleted. DAL L15 -37.1. LAL L15 +8.0 (but without Doncic/Reaves, meaningless). DAL spread +1.5 at 1.93: tanker as home underdog — tankers don't cover but LAL is also gutted. Too much uncertainty with both rosters compromised. No reliable edge.

LAC ML 1.11 far outside range. SAC ML 6.75 far outside range. SAC spread +13.0 at 1.92: SAC confirmed tank (21-57, L10 4-6), LaVine/Sabonis/Murray all OUT. LAC stats unavailable — cannot assess advanced stats per data quality rules. No edge possible without LAC stats.

GSW: Jimmy Butler OUT, Stephen Curry QUESTIONABLE (Pain Syndrome) — if Curry sits, GSW is gutted. Base conf for GSW ML bet would be very low given negative L15 and Curry uncertainty. GSW franchise player uncertainty: Curry Questionable → -10 conf. HOU confirmed hot (W5, NetRtg +5.1, L15 +46.1) but ML at 1.61 below floor. No qualifying bet available.
